item.title: Kristi Noem, Days After Testimony, Is Fired As Homeland Secretary
item.description: Noem, Trump says, will assume a newly created role as special envoy for the so-called "Shield of the Americas." Importance Rank: 1 read more

item.title: Walmart Stock Is Taking A Dive: What's Happening?
item.description: Walmart Inc shares are plunging on Thursday. A regulatory filing revealed a sizable insider sale by the Walton Family Holdings Trust. Importance Rank:...
